---
title: "The wars of Wapsburgh - by Charlotte Mary Yonge(1864)"
year: 1864
slug: "Wars of Wapsburgh"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


### Online text of***The Wars of Wapsburgh****  
*

### [Click here to read or download](https://onlinebooks.library.upenn.edu/webbin/book//lookupid?key=olbp49537)
